# SSLSetSessionTicketsEnabled(_:_:)

**Function**

Enables or disables session ticket resumption.

## Declaration

```swift
func SSLSetSessionTicketsEnabled(_ context: SSLContext, _ enabled: Bool) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **context**: A session context.
- **enabled**: A Boolean set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] to enable session ticket resumption, or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] to disable it.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/secure-transport-result-codes].

## Discussion

By default, session tickets are disabled.
